subject: Phase D: CFO Budget Agent
description:
Implement cost-aware model routing and budget enforcement:
- agents/archetypes/cfo.py (CFO budget agent)
- titan/costs/budget.py (Budget tracking)
- titan/costs/router.py (Cost-aware model selection)
- Modify adapters/router.py for cost-aware routing
- Modify hive/orchestrator.py for CFO integration
